measures.name: Production YoY Growth
measures.expression: VAR _CY = SUM(FactProductionOutput[GoodQuantity]) VAR _PY = CALCULATE(SUM(FactProductionOutput[GoodQuantity]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)

measures.name: Sigma Level
measures.expression: VAR _dpmo = DIVIDE(SUM(FactNonConformance[DefectQuantity]), SUM(FactQualityInspections[SampleSize])) * 1000000 RETURN IF(_dpmo > 0, 0.8406 + SQRT(29.37 - 2.221 * LN(_dpmo)), BLANK())

measures.name: FPY Trend MoM
measures.expression: VAR _CM = DIVIDE(CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactQualityInspections), FactQualityInspections[PassFail] = "Pass"), COUNTROWS(FactQualityInspections)) VAR _PM = CALCULATE(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactQualityInspections), FactQualityInspections[PassFail] = "Pass"), COUNTROWS(FactQualityInspections)), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, MONTH)) RETURN _CM - _PM

measures.name: PO YoY Growth
measures.expression: VAR _CY = COUNTROWS(FactPurchaseOrders) VAR _PY = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactPurchaseOrders), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)

measures.name: Maintenance YoY Cost
measures.expression: VAR _CY = SUM(FactMaintenanceWorkOrders[Cost]) VAR _PY = CALCULATE(SUM(FactMaintenanceWorkOrders[Cost]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)

measures.name: Sales YoY Growth
measures.expression: VAR _CY = SUM(FactSalesOrders[TotalAmount]) VAR _PY = CALCULATE(SUM(FactSalesOrders[TotalAmount]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)

measures.name: Production MoM Change %
measures.expression: VAR _CM = SUM(FactProductionOutput[GoodQuantity]) VAR _PM = CALCULATE(SUM(FactProductionOutput[GoodQuantity]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, MONTH)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CM - _PM, _PM)
